message:
beads: flush issues.jsonl from continued agent work

Second routine flush this session — same pattern as the previous
beads: commit. Captures incremental status/comment updates on the
br-doctor, br-k0y and related epic threads being worked by the
concurrent agent swarm.

.ntm/logs/* left uncommitted deliberately (same rationale as the
prior flush commit: daemon error logs that belong to the supervisor,
not to the agents).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
